text.message: why would anybody trade 2 for 1 on your turn
you have 1 dev and road locked up
dude i don't understand why i'm being solo chain robbed when i'm no longer ahead
Dont hate the player hate the game
orange is practically on 7/8 points already
i mean i dunno why you're so obsessed with robbing me in general blue
i'll do whatever trade i'll want for you to stop it
i'm literally in last and you're still probably going to rob me
i just blocked blacks 8 brick and robbed them
you literally only robbed me all game blue
orange is on 8 with open settle
watch the robber go on 5 stone
already reported blue for griefing and king making
lol, you are the one that traded black 2 citites
it was a good trade for me considering i'm in last
i'll make any trade to catch up
it maximizes my chances of winning
meanwhile you continue to rob from the person in last
you realise i blocked black on his brick port and stole from him?
you NEVER stole from black this game
literally only me this entire game
it's almost like you're on 9 points and hitting a 9 auto wins
like why do people play dumb
